scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=packages/client
scripts.start: DATA_DIR=${DATA_DIR:-data} && case $DATA_DIR in /*) ;; *) DATA_DIR=$PWD/$DATA_DIR;; esac && export DATA_DIR && npm run build && npx tsx packages/server/src/index.ts
scripts.dev: DATA_DIR=${DATA_DIR:-data} && case $DATA_DIR in /*) ;; *) DATA_DIR=$PWD/$DATA_DIR;; esac && export DATA_DIR && npm run build && npx tsx watch packages/server/src/index.ts
scripts.record: DATA_DIR=${DATA_DIR:-data} && case $DATA_DIR in /*) ;; *) DATA_DIR=$PWD/$DATA_DIR;; esac && export DATA_DIR && npm run record --workspace=packages/trainer
scripts.replay: DATA_DIR=${DATA_DIR:-data} && case $DATA_DIR in /*) ;; *) DATA_DIR=$PWD/$DATA_DIR;; esac && export DATA_DIR && npm run replay --workspace=packages/trainer
scripts.test_replay: DATA_DIR=${DATA_DIR:-data} && case $DATA_DIR in /*) ;; *) DATA_DIR=$PWD/$DATA_DIR;; esac && export DATA_DIR && npm run test_replay --workspace=packages/trainer
